response.original_title: ZEUS: The Chug With the Mind of a Bug
response.overview: In the final chapter of his life, 14-year-old Zeus - a blind, deaf, diabetic Chihuahua-Pug living with dementia, experiences a world that has slowly faded around him. Told entirely through his perspective, this intimate documentary invites viewers into the often-overlooked reality of growing old as a dog, revealing a side of companionship that many pet owners never truly see. A meditation on aging, memory, and the quiet bond between humans and their oldest friends.
response.title: ZEUS: The Chug With the Mind of a Bug
